name: Ubiquiti Switch DIN Rail Mount
title: Ubiquiti Switch DIN Rail Mount
title_extended: Ubiquiti Switch DIN Rail Mount - DIN Rail Mount for UniFi Compact Switches
short_description: DIN Rail Mount for Ubiquiti UniFi compact switches. Material: Polycarbonate. Dimensions: 125.7 x 40.5 x 20.6 mm. Weight: 0.0368 kg. Includes 1 unit.
description: The Ubiquiti Switch DIN Rail Mount (UACC-Switch-DIN) offers a robust and streamlined method for installing UniFi compact switches within industrial and commercial settings. Designed specifically for DIN rail applications, this mount ensures that your networking equipment is securely affixed, promoting an organized and efficient setup. Its compact form factor allows for optimal space utilization, making it an ideal choice for environments where space is at a premium. The UACC-Switch-DIN is compatible with a range of UniFi compact switches, including models such as the USW-Ultra, USW-Flex-2.5G-8, USW-Ultra-60W, USW-Flex-2.5G-8-PoE, and USW-Ultra-210W. Constructed from high-quality polycarbonate material, the UACC-Switch-DIN is built to withstand the demands of various operational environments. Its precise dimensions—125.7 mm in height, 40.5 mm in width, and 20.6 mm in depth—ensure a snug fit on standard DIN rails, while its lightweight design, weighing just 36.8 grams, adds minimal load to existing setups. The mount's design facilitates straightforward installation onto DIN rails, simplifying the deployment process and reducing setup time. Whether you're upgrading an existing network or establishing a new one, this mount provides a practical and efficient solution for securing your UniFi switches.
